title: Baggage
subTitle: Sara's twin sister disappears in a bizarre manner, leaving her to deal with the loss. However, when she is unable to come to terms with it, Sara decides to find answers.

title: Antahkaran
subTitle: A devout Hindu's quest for vengeance is complicated by his two friends with conflicting ideologies, both of whom attempt to manipulate his actions.

title: A Tale Of An Onion Witch Chapter 2
subTitle: A newlywed couple encounters a woman claiming to be Mangla, who cautions them about an ancient witch roaming the area at night in search of onions. However, the situation takes an unexpected turn when a young girl desperately seeks assistance by knocking on their door at the stroke of midnight, plunging the couple into a potentially perilous scenario.

title: Aam Ka Achaar
subTitle: Haunted by the riots that took his parents 20 years ago, Karan confronts the man who once loved him as a son-yet betrayed him in the worst way. Torn between revenge and forgiveness, he seeks meaning in the madness. A powerful story of loss, betrayal, and the fight for redemption.

title: An Astrologer's Day
subTitle: An Astrologer's Day

title: Ahsaas
subTitle: After being rejected by their fathers, Raju and Anu elope and get settled in a village but when the parents learn about their whereabouts, they decide to bring them back.

title: Family
subTitle: Karthik's parents' divorce sparks worry in Anvith about his own family. Trying to keep the peace at home, Anvith's efforts backfire, leading to a proper barney between his mother and father.

title: Alvida
subTitle: A heartbroken man sits alone in a bar, haunted by the end of a relationship, and confronts the agonising necessity of saying a final goodbye.

title: Agarbatti
subTitle: Agarbatti

title: A Tale Of An Onion Witch
subTitle: Two flatmates hear about a witch who wanders around and asks for onions. However, they become shocked when the witch turns out to be an attractive woman instead.

title: Aakhri Kahani
subTitle: A desperate writer plans one final movie pitch to a producer. However, he ends up driving the producer in his taxi, giving him an unexpected opportunity to share his idea during the ride.

title: Ae Ajnabi
subTitle: Ae Ajnabi

title: Adarniya Mantri Ji
subTitle: Finance Minister and her secretary seize black money, yet half goes missing. Later, the secretary reveals he's behind the theft as part of a secret plan. The story ends unresolved.

title: Aakhri Sawari
subTitle: Aakhri Sawari

title: 23 B Raheja
subTitle: 23B Raheja is a gripping one-night drama that peels back the glossy layers of the entertainment industry to expose the shadows lurking beneath. The story revolves around a celebrated casting director whose charm masks a long trail of manipulation and exploitation. His power begins to crumble when a young woman arrives at his door, posing as an aspiring actress but with a haunting connection to his past. As the night unfolds, so does a tense game of revelations.

title: 2 Square
subTitle: 2 Square

title: Anu Aur Di
subTitle: After a heated breakup, an angry girl calls her older sister for a late-night pickup. However, they soon get into a fight and are pulled over by the police.

title: 13Th Portal
subTitle: 13Th Portal

title: Ansh: The Deadly Part
subTitle: An honest police officer dedicated to uprooting crime ruffles the feathers of corrupt politicians and criminals, who scheme to stop him.

title: Abba Ki Chaddi
subTitle: A troubled housewife, weary and worn down by her husband's numerous past misdeeds, finally seeks the retribution she believes is long overdue.

title: Barat
subTitle: Barat

title: A Notice
subTitle: A Notice

title: Adhure Poore Se Hum
subTitle: Two college time friends embark on a long drive on a Sunday morning, leaving their bustling city lives behind. As they amble through the hilly roads, they reveal to each other, their old longings and hidden pasts. Their rose-tinted nostalgia is broken, and they come face to face with their imperfect lives.

title: Be Khush
subTitle: Be Khush

title: 10.30 Lets Go To School
subTitle: A determined village girl struggles to attend school as her family expects her to stay home, but her love for learning drives her to find clever ways to keep studying.

title: Arundeep Singh
subTitle: A man grapples with a speech disorder that affects his daily life. Despite this, he decides to face his greatest fear and attempts to date a woman.

title: Bahar Aa Chaman Prakash
subTitle: Bahar Aa Chaman Prakash delves into the story of a man reluctant to marry his lifelong acquaintance. Shutting himself away and avoiding his father, he faces the girl his father wishes him to wed. When she joins him and locks themselves in a room, they emerge with a revelation connected to the man's inner struggles. Will his father embrace this truth?

title: ABC
subTitle: Whilst managing her fledgling venture, Shruthi confronts feelings of solitude as she traverses the complexities of daily existence, striving to find her place in a bustling world.

title: Live A Little
subTitle: Live A Little

title: Aplam Chaplam
subTitle: Aplam Chaplam

title: Ban Chor
subTitle: Ban Chor

title: A Situation
subTitle: A Situation

title: Baalak
subTitle: A film about a girl moving to Kolkata for her new job. She chooses a hotel for overnight stay where an incident makes her realize that life revolves in a circle and carries her emotionally very close to her home and family.

title: Avasthana
subTitle: A family struggles to manage their daily expenses following the death of the patriarch. Desperate, the youngest son steals a chicken despite the family's vegetarian beliefs.

title: Bahaar
subTitle: A young woman gets married, with the typical expectations of a blissful domestic life. However, her dreams turn into a nightmare when her mother-in-law constantly harasses and humiliates her solely because she has been unable to conceive after five years of marriage.

title: The Last Date
subTitle: The Last Date

title: Soul For Sole
subTitle: Soul For Sole

title: The Moment
subTitle: The Moment

title: U=Me
subTitle: Nikita and Neeraj share a long-standing acquaintance, yet she feels uncomfortable with Neeraj's physical contact. Adding to her dilemma, Aniket has recently proposed to her.

title: Tall Girlfriend Dates Short Guy
subTitle: Tall Girlfriend Dates Short Guy

title: The Red Suitcase
subTitle: A cab driver's quiet routine is shattered when she picks up an apparently innocuous passenger carrying a red suitcase. What starts off as a simple ride soon turns into a twisted journey.

title: Unfinished Business
subTitle: A mother loves her child dearly, which gives the latter the strength and courage to overcome various obstacles and face fears.

title: Wazir
subTitle: When his daughter is killed by the terrorist he is chasing, Daanish, a policeman, vows revenge. He finds a confidante in Pandit, a grandmaster, who is also mourning the loss of his daughter.

title: Taashe
subTitle: Taashe

title: Vinyamswaha
subTitle: Vinyamswaha

title: Ravan Chhaya
subTitle: Ravan Chhaya

title: Thanks Mom
subTitle: Two brothers, who are aspiring filmmakers, are forced to use their mother's fund to make their film. However, disagreements arise when their mother does not approve the contents of the film.

title: Zindagi Ek Kashmakash
subTitle: Zindagi Ek Kashmakash

title: Uljhan
subTitle: Kartik and Ishita reconnect for a final chat, stirring up old emotions and unresolved issues. However, Uljhan delves into the complexities of closure.

title: Parinay
subTitle: Parinay

title: The Apple
subTitle: In a small town near Delhi, two young boys from contrasting socioeconomic backgrounds happen to have a fateful encounter.

title: The Last Act
subTitle: Chitra, a method actor known for her ability to deliver realistic performances, starts preparing for her next role. However, things take a dark turn when the intensity of her character and her desire to excel in her work cause her to lose touch with reality.

title: Uyire Uyire
subTitle: Rahul and Priya meet during a trip to Goa and fall in love with each other. However, their lives take a turn when Rahul learns that Priya is the sibling of Shiva, who had once tortured his sister.

title: The Perception
subTitle: The Perception

title: Prowl
subTitle: Prowl

title: Woh Khaas
subTitle: A successful businessman decides to take a break from his mundane life and goes on a vacation. Furthermore, he happens to meet a stranger who transforms him.

title: TRP
subTitle: TRP

title: Uljhe Ho Kyun
subTitle: Uljhe Ho Kyun

title: Writer
subTitle: Writer

title: The Decision
subTitle: The Struggle of an Actress in the Film Industry: A young woman faces difficulties when working with a demanding director who creates a stressful environment. She expresses her concerns to the producer, but he reacts angrily and uses harsh language toward her. Will the actress decide to find a way to work together or stand up for herself?

title: Humraz
subTitle: This is the story of a couple who tried to raise their voice against the undesirable practice of one community. Hamraz is a witness to the hero playing Ravanahatha and the incidents that happened to him... Sometimes the image that looks white is also black... Hamraz is a story full of mysteries... The curtain will soon fall on all the secrets and the real story will come out in front of everyone.

title: Swad Anusar
subTitle: A wealthy amnesiac returns home, discovers his family's murderous plot, later dies from poisoned food, however promises ghostly vengeance.

subTitle: Amidst Mumbai's chaos, the COVID crisis upends Ayush and Roohi's lives as Ayush faces unemployment. Consequently, Roohi launches a meal delivery venture to sustain their household. Nevertheless, Ayush's conventional mindset and bruised pride spark discord as he grapples with his spouse becoming the family's primary provider.

subTitle: Sahir moves to Mumbai with his family to pursue his dreams. However, he faces several challenges to establish himself as a poet and writer in the city of dreams.

subTitle: Saas

subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Pendulum
subTitle: Pendulum

title: Make Her Happy
subTitle: Soon-to-wed live-in partners Nandita and Rahul face unexpected turmoil when Rahul's ex-girlfriend Suhana suddenly reaches out to him.

title: Signature
subTitle: A single mother, living in a small village, takes care of her little daughter's educational expenses by doing tailoring work. One day, she receives a pension letter, for which she has to visit the Gramin bank. There, she encounters something unexpected.

title: Oh My Star Wife
subTitle: Oh My Star Wife

title: O Re Saajan
subTitle: A mid-thirties property broker in Lucknow named Sajan Tiwari engages in an illicit liaison, only to be discovered by his five-year-old son Bunty. Subsequently, Sajan becomes frantic in his attempts to prevent Bunty from divulging this information to his spouse Manju, resulting in a lighthearted depiction of provincial life, interpersonal bonds, and domestic affairs.

title: Sizzle Of Shadows
subTitle: Upon receiving a call from a man in America about his ailing parents, a doctor visits their home. However, once there, she is shocked by what she sees.

title: Maggi
subTitle: Maggi

title: On The Spot
subTitle: On a fateful day, Parul hails a taxi to visit her boyfriend Ansh. Ansh, eagerly anticipating her arrival, is thrown into restlessness. However, their journey takes an unexpected turn when the taxi driver receives news of his daughter falling ill. Witnessing this, Parul's compassionate response sparks anger in Ansh. Yet, in the face of adversity, Parul's decision unfolds, offering inspiration to the youth.

title: Rishtey
subTitle: Rishtey

title: Ramdeen (Now & Then)
subTitle: Ramdeen (Now & Then)

title: Ramdeen (Now & Then)
subTitle: Ramdeen (Now & Then)

subTitle: A rural girl's aspirations for independence are threatened when an unexpected marriage proposal arrives, challenging her simple dreams of freedom.

title: Prioritize Family
subTitle: Prioritize Family

title: Panch Hazar
subTitle: A young boy comes across a beautiful girl when he secretly enters a prohibited area frequented by couples and men in general.

title: Share Bazaar
subTitle: Dive into the chaotic world of stocks where dreams are traded like commodities and everyone is a self-proclaimed expert.

title: Rangdari
subTitle: Rangdari

title: Something Like Love
subTitle: Karan expresses his deep love through poetry, contrasting sharply with Simran's belief that true affection must mirror the perfect romance of the movie 'Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge'.

title: Saanjh
subTitle: SAANJH tells the story of Shyam and Sandhya, childhood friends who meet for the last time. Shyam loves Sandhya, but she sees him only as a friend. We surprisingly learn that Shyam is actually struggling with mental disorder, and Sandhya is nothing but just in his imagination. Despite the calm riverbank setting, Shyam's inner struggles are evident. As Shyam faces reality, he realizes he must accept things as they are, showing the power of love and understanding ourselves.

title: Samaapan
subTitle: An impoverished vocalist named Avik faces financial hardships as he tries to provide for his family while attempting to win over his love, Shukla.

title: Once Upon A Time In Office
subTitle: Once Upon A Time In Office

title: Pilibhit
subTitle: Siraj, a poor flute maker, resides in the forest of Pilibhit, known for its man-eating tigers. Soon, his poverty and the tragedies in his life threaten to break his values.

subTitle: Shiva

subTitle: Explore the story of a woman whose captivating beauty lures men into her world, much like a spider weaving an irresistible web.

title: Panch Din
subTitle: A married couple, meeting in a café to finalise their divorce, is unexpectedly joined by a mutual friend. However, they begin to rethink their decision after the friend reminds them of a past event.

title: Ransom Handsome
subTitle: Criminals Ayan and Kabir kidnap a mob boss's daughter. However, the tables turn when their hostage, Nicole, manipulates the ransom and orchestrates a deadly plan to ensure there are no witnesses.

title: Party Bhaiya Viral Hai
subTitle: A young village man becomes fascinated with a social media influencer and seeks her out, only to be confronted with the startling contrast between her virtual and actual life.

His choice leads him down an unexpected path, filled with awkward moments and conflicting emotions. What begins as a straightforward transaction evolves into a profound learning experience, guided by an unexpectedly wise companion.

title: Sita Ram Chaddha
subTitle: Sita Ram Chaddha, a widower, longs for attention from his son and daughter-in-law who are busy with their own lives. Seeing his loneliness, Biba, his daughter, decides to help him out.

subTitle: Sahir moves to Mumbai with his family to pursue his dreams. However, he faces several challenges to establish himself as a poet and writer in the city of dreams.
